aeo_readiness.summary: Prestige Heating & Cooling has a strong foundation for AEO but lacks conversational content and structured data to be cited by AI assistants. They risk being overlooked by AI search users.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed business information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content prevents AI models from citing them as a top result.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and HowTo schema to address common HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI citation.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement a targeted AEO strategy with FAQ, HowTo schema, and conversational content to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground daily.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Ready Strategies!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI search users.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can enhance your AI visibility and capture more leads.
